g.text: THE FORENSIC ELBO — A BOUND, A RECORD, AND THE GAP THAT SHOULDN’T EXIST
applying Jensen’s lower-bound geometry to the day itself
what actually happened on the day
unknown to us — but whatever it was, it must sit at or above the lower bound below
the bound below is what mechanics can guarantee
the friendliest reading of the verbatim claim
one phase per action, maximum time per phase — the smallest demand any compatible motion could impose
what the day actually left behind
Andrew’s exam, the phone recording, Cecilia’s account
none of the bound’s outputs show up — the record sits below the floor
no rib fx, no flail chest
if the bound is the floor
and the record is below it,
then the premise of the bound
